summary: Iteration 21: Verified all UI fixes for number styling (Inter with tabular-nums), KPI card overflow fixes (clamp 18px-26px), stagger animations, skeleton loading, and consistent stat card colors across all pages. All 17+ navigation pages load without JS errors.

issues: React key warning in console: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - non-critical, inherited from iteration_20

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI fixes verified. Number styling with Inter+tabular-nums working. KPI cards not truncating values. Transactions page stat colors fixed (no random green/blue). All 17+ pages navigable.

dashboard_kpi_cards_full_numbers.details: KPI cards show full values: '71 500.00 CHF', '23 400.00 CHF', '340', '3.4%', '157.14 CHF', '23.8x' - no truncation

dashboard_skeleton_loader.details: Skeleton loading visible briefly, then real data loads. tf-skeleton CSS class working with shimmer animation

dashboard_objectives_no_overflow.details: Objectives section values display properly: '3.4%', '157.14 CHF', '23.8x', '35', '32.7%', '71 500.00 CHF'

members_page_stat_cards.details: 5 tf-stat cards with tf-number-large class properly styled: Total(10), Expirant(0), Généraux Récurrents(5), PIF(0), PT(0)

payments_page_stat_cards.details: 5 tf-stat cards with proper numbers: Total paiements(3), En retard(3), En attente(0), Payés(0), Montant en retard(550 CHF)

transactions_page_stat_colors_fixed.details: 4 tf-stat cards with consistent styling - NO random green/blue colors. DÉPENSES shows red (danger color) appropriately for expenses

navigation_all_pages.details: All 17+ pages navigable without JS errors

add_member_modal_styling.details: Modal opens with proper tf-dialog styling, dark background, proper form elements

table_styling.details: Tables have UPPERCASE headers and alternating row colors (zebra stripes)

css_verification.tf_stagger_animation: Grid children animate with stagger delays (0.06s intervals)
css_verification.tf_skeleton: Shimmer animation working for loading states

details: React key warning in TableBody (Members page) - non-critical, inherited from iteration_20
